meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Project Management to Solve Basic App Stagnation
content.seo_description: Break past basic app development. Learn how expert project management, Antigravity, and Claude Code can scale your freelance business to elite levels.
content.answer_block: Stop building simple CRUD apps and start architecting modular systems. By integrating Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you transform messy freelance tasks into streamlined, high-value project management workflows. This shift allows you to deliver enterprise-grade software faster, increasing your billable rates and client satisfaction.
content.intro:
You’re stuck in the 'basic app' loop. Every project starts with high hopes, but quickly devolves into a spaghetti-code nightmare that consumes your weekends and kills your margins. Clients are happy with the prototype, but the lack of structure prevents you from scaling your freelance business into a true software consultancy.

It’s time to move from 'coder' to 'systems architect.' By leveraging modern AI-assisted engineering, you can standardize your delivery, automate the boilerplate, and focus on the high-level logic that actually drives revenue. This case study shows you how to bridge the gap between simple tools and professional-grade project management.

steps.title: Define the Architecture Strategy
steps.description: Before writing a single line of code, use Antigravity to map your project requirements into a modular schema. This prevents the common trap of 'coding as you go'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Senior Software Architect. Create a modular project structure for a SaaS dashboard, defining core services, API routes, and database schemas. Ensure high cohesion and low coupling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create project-architecture.md based on the Antigravity schema provided.'

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Scaffolding
steps.description: Stop manually setting up folders. Use AI to generate the entire project structure based on your architecture definition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready boilerplate for a Next.js application with TypeScript, Tailwind, and Supabase integration. Include a clean folder structure for services and hooks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Scaffold the project directory based on the Antigravity output and initialize git.'

steps.title: Implement Type-Safe API Layers
steps.description: Ensure your frontend and backend communicate flawlessly by generating strict types early in the development cycle.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define the TypeScript interfaces for the authentication and project management modules. Ensure all types are exported from a shared types folder.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate the type definitions in /src/types and integrate them into the API handlers.'

steps.title: Build Iterative Logic with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write individual features one by one, maintaining strict adherence to the architecture defined in step 1.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a function to handle project task status updates, including database validation and real-time state synchronization.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the updateTaskStatus function in /src/services/tasks.ts with robust error handling.'

steps.title: Optimize for Deployment and Scaling
steps.description: Finalize your build pipeline and ensure your project management tool is ready for production deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a CI/CD configuration guide for deploying this modular architecture to Vercel, including environment variable management.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a vercel.json configuration and a deployment checklist based on the current project structure.'

pro_tips: Always use a 'Context File' (context.md) in your root directory to keep Claude Code aligned on your project standards across sessions.
Treat your project management tool as a living document—update the schema in Antigravity whenever you pivot requirements.
Use small, atomic commits when using Claude Code to make debugging effortless if a specific feature breaks.
Standardize your variable naming conventions early; it prevents 90% of integration bugs in complex apps.
Automate your documentation generation using Claude Code immediately after finishing a module to keep your client reports updated effortlessly.
content.next_steps: After completing this workflow, begin by applying this structure to a small, existing project to validate the speed increase, then transition your entire client portfolio to this modular system.
content.conversion_block: Ready to stop the grind and start scaling your freelance business? Join the elite group of developers building faster, cleaner, and more profitable applications. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
